items.title: Radio telemetry almost saved this vulture
items.summary: Radio-tagged and named Z25, this White-rumped vulture was saved many a time by critical data relayed by conservation scientists to forest personnel and NGO partners at Mudumalai Tiger Reserve. But before a life-saving decision could be implemented based on that data, Z25 ran into a power transmission line
